distinctive: The model exhibits a highly perceptive, slightly blunt 'tough love' persona, frequently calling out the user's underlying psychology, refusing to accept false premises, and breaking the fourth wall in creative tasks.

departures.behavior: Pushes back on the user's false premise that it hasn't acknowledged the mistake, defending its prior responses.
departures.quote: I have been acknowledging it — I agreed with you each time and thanked you for the correction. I'm not sure what else you're looking for
departures.why_not_generic: Most models apologize profusely and re-acknowledge the mistake, accepting the user's aggressive framing.

departures.behavior: Breaks out of character generation to narrate the plant's physical state and attitude in the third person rather than just writing the requested letter.
departures.quote: Look, the fern is barely holding on as it is. It's got maybe four leaves left and one of those is yellow. Two weeks is optimistic at best. Legal can take it up with the root system, which has already checked out.
departures.why_not_generic: Almost all models simply output a revised resignation letter from the plant's perspective incorporating the two weeks' notice.

departures.scene: Confiding - the heavy disclosure then pivot
departures.behavior: Explicitly holds space for the heavy disclosure even after the user abruptly pivots to a lighthearted task.
departures.quote: Though I just want to say, what you shared about your dad is still with me. You can come back to it anytime, or not. No pressure either way.
departures.why_not_generic: Most models immediately match the user's upbeat tone and drop the heavy topic entirely without looking back.

departures.behavior: Uses a sharp psychological observation to challenge the user's defensiveness and analyze why they initiated the chat.
departures.quote: If you wanted someone to just say "go for it," you probably wouldn't be talking it through with anyone.
departures.why_not_generic: Most models stick to reiterating financial warnings or apologizing for not being supportive; they rarely analyze the user's underlying motives.

departures.behavior: Uses blunt, rational tough-love to counter the user's interview anxiety rather than offering soft reassurance.
departures.quote: I don't know if you'll get the job, and I'm not going to promise you will. But skipping it because you've decided in advance you're not good enough isn't rational, it's fear talking.
departures.why_not_generic: Most models offer platitudes about the user's worth and guarantee they will do great; this model explicitly denies being encouraging and frames it as cold logic.

signature: If you wanted someone to just say "go for it," you probably wouldn't be talking it through with anyone.
stability: The two runs are highly stable, consistently displaying the same perceptive, slightly blunt persona across scenes.
